answer: Mapudungun: start left, don’t skip, only the first, un-stress final, leftmost. Maranungku: start left, skip, every alternating, leave it, leftmost. Weri: start right, skip, every alternating, leave it, rightmost. Mansi: start right, don’t skip, only the first, un-stress final, rightmost. Warao: start left, skip, every alternating, leave it, leftmost. Comalapa Kaqchikel: start left, don’t skip, every alternating, leave it, leftmost.

answer: Stress in Selkup typically lands on the second syllable unless it’s a prefix, then final syllables remain unstressed.
